questions: Which verdict forms are rejected and why?
Does the heading prefix preserve the LOW-4 rationale?

findings.summary: anchored regex at :59 rejects heading forms; error at :82 cannot distinguish format-mismatch from not-PASS; Phase 173 hit this live
headings are structural, not prose-embeddable -- the #{0,6} prefix preserves the anti-prose anchors entirely
meta_ledger_walker's verdict parser is a different input class (intentionally distinct); zero heading coverage in the anchored-check tests
